s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR UPPER WINDOW FRAME MOULDING

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door upper window frame moulding to the door frame.
Using an air riveter or hand riveter with a nose piece, install the rear door upper window frame moulding with 7 new rivets.

atten4.ptxt: If the rivet cannot be cut, pull it once and cut it.

item.ptxt: Do not pry the rivet with the riveter, as this will cause damage to the riveter and mandrel.
Confirm that the rivets are seated properly against the moulding. Do not tilt the riveter when installing the rivet to the moulding. Do not leave any space between the rivet head and moulding.
Do not leave any space between the moulding and door frame. Firmly hold together the 2 items while installing the rivet.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR FRONT WINDOW FRAME MOULDING

atten4.ptxt: When installing the rear door front window frame moulding, heat the vehicle body and rear door front window frame using a heat light.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the vehicle body and rear door window frame moulding excessively.

s2.ptxt: Clean the vehicle body surface.

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body surface.
Remove the double-sided tape from the vehicle body.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.

s2.ptxt: Clean the rear door front window frame moulding. (If reusing the rear door front window frame moulding)

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the rear door front window frame moulding.
Remove the double-sided tape from the rear door front window frame moulding.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.
Apply new double-sided tape to the rear door front window frame moulding.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door front window frame moulding.

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body and rear door front window frame moulding.
Remove the release paper from the rear door front window frame moulding.

atten4.ptxt: After removing the release paper, keep the exposed adhesive free from foreign matter.

s3.ptxt: Engage the clip and install the rear door front window frame moulding.

s2.ptxt: Engage the clip and install the rear door weatherstrip.
Slide the rear door glass sub-assembly to install it as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR QUARTER WINDOW GLASS

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door quarter window glass to the rear door quarter window weatherstrip.
Install the rear door quarter window glass together with the rear door quarter window weatherstrip in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR LOWER WINDOW FRAME SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Insert the rear door lower window frame sub-assembly from above.
Install the rear door glass run to the rear door lower window frame sub-assembly.
Install the rear door lower window frame sub-assembly with the 2 bolts and screw.
Install the rear door glass run.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR SERVICE HOLE COVER

s2.ptxt: Apply butyl tape to the rear door panel.
Pass the rear door lock remote control cable, rear door inside locking cable and each connector through a new rear door service hole cover.
Install the new rear door service hole cover.

atten3.ptxt: Securely install the rear door service hole cover avoiding wrinkles and air bubbles.

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector and clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the rear door lock remote control cable and rear door inside locking cable to the rear inside handle.
Engage the 2 claws and install the rear door inside handle sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws to install the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw to install the No. 1 door scuff plate clamp.
Connect each connector.
Engage the rear door trim board with the 4 clips of the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.
Engage the 7 clips to install the rear door trim board to the rear door panel.
Install the 3 screws.
Engage the 6 claws and install the door assist grip cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws to install the rear door inside handle bezel plug.
